skills.title: Use Skillpedia
skills.description: Find and use skills from Skillpedia, a directory of CC-licensed instruction files for AI and human agents
skills.author: CERI SAS
skills.content:
---
title: "Use Skillpedia"
description: "Find and use skills from Skillpedia, a directory of CC-licensed instruction files for AI and human agents"
tags: ["skillpedia", "skills", "hyperskills", "directory", "agents"]
license: "CC BY-SA 4.0"
author: "CERI SAS"
---

Skillpedia (skillpedia.eu) is a directory of skills — instruction files for AI and human agents — encoded as hyperskills.

## Find a skill

1. Browse by category: https://skillpedia.eu/repertoire.html
2. Search the machine-readable index: https://skillpedia.eu/skills.json

## What is a hyperskill?

A hyperskill is a URL with a base64-encoded skill in the hs query parameter:

    source_url?hs=BASE64_OF_SKILL_CONTENT

To decode in JavaScript: atob(new URL(url).searchParams.get("hs"))
To decode in Python: import base64; base64.b64decode(hs_param).decode()

## Submit a skill

1. Write your skill in Markdown (Agent Skills format recommended: agentskills.io)
2. Choose the source URL (where the skill applies)
3. Encode: btoa(skillContent) or base64.b64encode(content.encode()).decode()
4. Build URL: source_url?hs=encodedContent
5. Fork github.com/jeanbaptiste/skillpedia and add your skill to skills.json

## License

Skills on Skillpedia are under Creative Commons license (see each skill metadata).

skills.title: Analyser les amendements
skills.description: Rechercher et analyser les amendements à partir des tables du schéma assemblee de canutes.
skills.author: tricoteuses.fr
skills.content:
---
title: "Analyser les amendements"
description: "Rechercher et analyser les amendements à partir des tables du schéma assemblee de canutes."
tags: ["amendements", "cosignataires", "députés", "sql", "jsonb"]
license: "CC BY-SA 4.0"
author: "tricoteuses.fr"
---

La base unique canutes expose les schémas assemblee, legifrance et senat.
Cette recette cible assemblee, en travaillant directement sur assemblee.amendements.

Fonctions disponibles:
- filtres dans des colonnes dénormalisées (texte_loi_uid, legislature)
- table de jointure deputes_signataires_amendements pour les signataires députés
- combiner jointure et JSONB pour les cosignatures
